info.title: Restaurant Voicebot Tool API
info.description: Backend Tool_API for the Restaurant Voicebot Platform. Exposes the customer-facing tool endpoints registered with the AWS AgentCore Gateway as OpenAPI targets, and serves the staff/kitchen web app.

post.summary: Request an SMS OTP for a phone number
post.description:
Request delivery of a one-time passcode to ``payload.phone_number`` (R1).

Delegates to ``auth_service.request_otp`` (which validates E.164, invalidates
prior OTPs, stores the new code, and requests SMS delivery) and returns a
minimal confirmation that carries no OTP value (R1.7).

post.summary: Verify an OTP and issue a Session_Token
post.description:
Verify the OTP, resolve the Customer, and issue a Session_Token (R2).

Chains ``verify_otp`` (match/expiry/attempt logic + Customer resolution,
R2.1-R2.5/R2.7) with ``issue_session`` (mint a 24h token bound to the
resolved Customer_Id, R2.1/R2.6). The issued-session result is serialized
into :class:`OtpVerifyResponse`, whose ``session_token`` field reads the
result's ``token`` attribute via its validation alias.

get.summary: List available menu items (optional dietary_flag filter)
get.description:
List available Menu_Items, optionally filtered by Dietary_Flag (R4.1/4.2).

Returns an empty list when nothing matches (R4.6). An unrecognized
``dietary_flag`` is rejected by the service with a validation error before
any item is read (R4.7).

get.summary: Get the details of a single menu item
get.description:
Return the detail of the Menu_Item identified by ``item_id`` (R4.3).

Raises a not-found error when no Menu_Item with ``item_id`` exists (R4.4).

get.summary: Get the current cart with totals
get.description: Return the resolved Customer's current Cart contents and total (R5.8).

post.summary: Add a menu item and quantity to the cart
post.description:
Add ``payload.quantity`` of ``payload.menu_item_id`` to the Cart (R5.1-R5.8).

Returns the updated Cart contents with the computed total. Invalid quantity
(R5.6), exceeding the 99 per-item cap (R5.3), an unknown (R5.4) or
unavailable (R5.5) Menu_Item, or an unresolved Customer (R5.7) are rejected
by the service, leaving the Cart unchanged.

post.summary: Place an order from the current cart
post.description:
Place an order from the resolved Customer's Cart (R6.1-R6.10).

Uses the supplied placement Payment_Status (default ``cash-on-delivery``).
An empty Cart (R6.7) or a profile with no delivery address (R6.10) is
rejected by the service, leaving the Cart unchanged.

get.summary: Get the current (active) order with its status
get.description:
Return the resolved Customer's current active Order, if any (R9).

When the Customer has a not-"delivered" Order, ``has_current_order`` is true
and ``order`` carries its detail (the most recent one, R9.1-R9.3). When
there is none, ``has_current_order`` is false and ``order`` is null (R9.4).

get.summary: Get the details of an order
get.description:
Return the owning Customer's Order detail (R7).

A nonexistent Order (R7.2) or one owned by a different Customer (R7.3) is
rejected by the service; no details are revealed.

get.summary: Get the delivery status of an order
get.description:
Return the owning Customer's Order Delivery_Status (R8).

The ``order_id`` path parameter is an integer, so it is inherently present;
the service still validates it (R8.5) and enforces existence (R8.3) and
ownership (R8.4) before returning one of the five defined statuses (R8.2).

get.summary: Get the customer profile and order history
get.description: Return the resolved Customer's profile + order history (R10.1, R10.4).

patch.description:
Update the supplied profile fields and return the profile (R10.2-R10.6).

Only the fields present in the request body are changed; unsent fields are
preserved. Invalid Dietary_Preference (R10.5), out-of-range Usual_Portion
(R10.6), or an out-of-bounds address are rejected by the service, leaving
the profile unmodified.

quantity.title: Quantity
quantity.description: Per-item quantity, an integer from 1 to 99.

AddCartItemRequest.title: AddCartItemRequest
AddCartItemRequest.description: Body of ``POST /cart/items`` (R5.1 / R5.6): the item id and quantity to add.

CartItemResponse.title: CartItemResponse
CartItemResponse.description: One line of returned cart contents (R5.8): per-item price and quantity.

CartResponse.title: CartResponse
CartResponse.description: The cart contents (R5.1 / R5.8): line items plus the computed total.

CurrentOrderResponse.title: CurrentOrderResponse
CurrentOrderResponse.description:
Response of ``GET /orders/current`` (R9).

When the Customer has an active order, ``has_current_order`` is true and
``order`` carries its details with status (R9.1-R9.3). When there is none,
``has_current_order`` is false and ``order`` is null (R9.4).

calories.title: Calories
calories.description: Calorie count, an integer from 0 to 10000.

price.title: Price
price.description: Menu item price, 0.00-999999.99 with 2 decimal places.

MenuItemCreateRequest.title: MenuItemCreateRequest
MenuItemCreateRequest.description:
Body of ``POST /menu`` (R12.1): create a menu item (defaults unavailable).

Availability is intentionally not accepted here - a created item is always
unavailable (R12.1); it is only togglable on update once calories/price are
positive (R4.5 / R12.6).

price.title: Price
price.description: Menu item price, 0.00-999999.99 with 2 decimal places.

MenuItemDetail.title: MenuItemDetail
MenuItemDetail.description: A menu item detail (R4.3): the listing summary plus the availability flag.

price.title: Price
price.description: Menu item price, 0.00-999999.99 with 2 decimal places.

MenuItemSummary.title: MenuItemSummary
MenuItemSummary.description: A menu listing entry (R4.1 / R4.2): the fields shown in the menu list.

anyOf.description: Calorie count, an integer from 0 to 10000.
Menu item price, 0.00-999999.99 with 2 decimal places.

MenuItemUpdateRequest.title: MenuItemUpdateRequest
MenuItemUpdateRequest.description:
Body of ``PATCH /menu/{item_id}`` (R12.2): partial update.

Every field is optional; only supplied fields are changed and the rest are
preserved. Each supplied field still carries its EARS bounds so an
out-of-range value is rejected (R12.3 / R12.4 / R12.7), and the availability
invariant (R4.5 / R12.6) is enforced by the service against the effective
post-update values.

special_price.title: Special Price
special_price.description: Offer special price, 0.00-999999.99 with 2 decimal places.

OfferCreateRequest.title: OfferCreateRequest
OfferCreateRequest.description: Body of ``POST /offers`` (R14.1): create an offer (active by default).

OfferResponse.title: OfferResponse
OfferResponse.description: An offer (R14.2): id, name, included Menu_Items, special price, active state.

anyOf.description: Offer special price, 0.00-999999.99 with 2 decimal places.

OfferUpdateRequest.title: OfferUpdateRequest
OfferUpdateRequest.description:
Body of ``PATCH /offers/{offer_id}`` (R14.3): partial update.

Every field is optional; only supplied fields are changed. Supplied fields
keep their EARS bounds so an invalid name/price/item-set is rejected
(R14.6 / R14.7 / R14.8).

OrderHistoryEntryResponse.title: OrderHistoryEntryResponse
OrderHistoryEntryResponse.description:
A single order in the profile's order history (R10.4).

Includes the order identifier, its Menu_Items, total price, Payment_Status,
Delivery_Status, and creation timestamp.

OrderHistoryItemResponse.title: OrderHistoryItemResponse
OrderHistoryItemResponse.description: One Menu_Item line within a profile order-history entry (R10.4).

OrderItemResponse.title: OrderItemResponse
OrderItemResponse.description: One line of an order (R7.1): per-item unit price and quantity.

OrderResponse.title: OrderResponse
OrderResponse.description:
A full order (R6.1, R7.1, R11.1, R13.1).

Carries the identifier, owning customer, line items, total price, payment and
delivery status, the delivery-address snapshot, and the creation timestamp.

phone_number.title: Phone Number
phone_number.description: Customer phone number in E.164 format, e.g. +14155552671.

OtpRequestRequest.title: OtpRequestRequest
OtpRequestRequest.description: Body of ``POST /auth/otp/request``: the phone number to send an OTP to (R1).

sent.title: Sent
sent.description: True when the OTP was accepted for delivery.

OtpRequestResponse.title: OtpRequestResponse
OtpRequestResponse.description:
Response of ``POST /auth/otp/request`` (R1.7).

Confirms only that the OTP was sent; it never includes the OTP value or any
other data, mirroring ``auth_service.OtpRequestResult``.

phone_number.title: Phone Number
phone_number.description: Customer phone number in E.164 format, e.g. +14155552671.

OtpVerifyRequest.title: OtpVerifyRequest
OtpVerifyRequest.description: Body of ``POST /auth/otp/verify``: phone number + the 6-digit OTP (R2).

session_token.title: Session Token
session_token.description: Opaque high-entropy Session_Token for subsequent calls.

customer_id.title: Customer Id
customer_id.description: The resolved Customer_Id the token authorizes.

OtpVerifyResponse.title: OtpVerifyResponse
OtpVerifyResponse.description:
Response of ``POST /auth/otp/verify``: the issued session (R2.1, R2.6).

Carries the opaque Session_Token, the resolved Customer_Id it is bound to,
and its 24-hour expiry. ``session_token`` accepts the service result's
``token`` attribute via a validation alias so the router can construct it
with ``model_validate(issue_session_result)``.

PlaceOrderRequest.title: PlaceOrderRequest
PlaceOrderRequest.description:
Body of ``POST /orders`` (R6.2): optional placement Payment_Status.

Defaults to ``cash-on-delivery``; only the two placement-time values are
accepted (``paid`` is a valid Payment_Status in general but not at
placement, R6.2).

ProfileResponse.title: ProfileResponse
ProfileResponse.description: A customer profile (R10.1): preferences plus the order-history list (R10.4).

anyOf.description: Usual portion: an integer from 1 to 99.

ProfileUpdateRequest.title: ProfileUpdateRequest
ProfileUpdateRequest.description:
Body of ``PATCH /profile`` (R10.2 / R10.3): partial profile update.

Every field is optional; only supplied fields are changed. ``dietary_preference``
is constrained to the allowed enum (R10.5), ``usual_portion`` to an integer
1-99 (R10.6), and ``address`` to 1-250 characters (R10.3). ``customer_type``
is a free-form string (R10.3 places no enumerated bound on it).
